name: chrXp11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome X p-arm pericentric flank (Xp11.1-Xp11.21), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chrX centromere. Alpha-satellite (DXZ1), pericentromeric SDs and HSat patches. Distally adjoins the OPHN1 / WAS-locus region. Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR (DXZ1) + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; pseudoautosomal nature absent — strictly X-specific HOR.
